CorpusId:273400864.title: A prenatal skin atlas reveals immune regulation of human skin morphogenesis
CorpusId:273400864.abstract: Human prenatal skin is populated by innate immune cells, including macrophages, but whether they act solely in immunity or have additional functions in morphogenesis is unclear...
CorpusId:273400864.tldr: Comprehensive multi-omics reference atlas of prenatal human skin (7-17 PCW) revealing immune-non-immune cell crosstalk in skin morphogenesis.

CorpusId:31380838.title: Single-cell RNA-seq reveals new types of human blood dendritic cells, monocytes, and progenitors
CorpusId:31380838.tldr: Identified 6 DC subsets in human blood by scRNA-seq, including AS-DC (DC5) defined by AXL, SIGLEC1, SIGLEC6 expression.

CorpusId:206651407.title: Mapping the human DC lineage through the integration of high-dimensional techniques
CorpusId:206651407.tldr: Identified CD33+CD45RA+CD123+ pre-DCs expressing AXL and SIGLEC6 that can differentiate into cDC1 and cDC2.

CorpusId:247009561.title: Human dendritic cell subsets: An updated view of their ontogeny and functional specialization
CorpusId:247009561.tldr: Updated review of human DC subsets, describing AXL+SIGLEC6+ DCs as a transitional population with mixed pDC-cDC features.

CorpusId:209230037.title: Re-evaluation of human BDCA-2+ DC during acute sterile skin inflammation
CorpusId:209230037.abstract: An unexpected BDCA-2+CD123+CD1a+ DC subset comprises a major DC population in acute human sterile skin inflammation.
CorpusId:209230037.tldr: ASDCs are recruited to inflamed skin and are highly activated, expressing CCL22 and CD83.

CorpusId:270761460.title: Characterising plasmacytoid and myeloid AXL+ SIGLEC-6+ dendritic cell functions and their interactions with HIV
CorpusId:270761460.tldr: ASDCs subdivide into CD11c+ and CD123+ subsets with distinct functions; both polarize T cells toward Th2/Th9/Th22/Th17/Treg.

CorpusId:250977253.title: Plasmacytoid Dendritic Cells, a Novel Target in Myeloid Neoplasms
CorpusId:250977253.tldr: AS-DCs represent 2-3% of DCs, are CD123+CD11c-/low, co-express AXL/SIGLEC1/6/SIGLEC2/CD22, and are E2-2/TCF4-dependent.

CorpusId:273402005.title: The lifespan and kinetics of human dendritic cell subsets and their precursors in health and inflammation
CorpusId:273402005.tldr: ASDCs are recruited during inflammation, acquire an effector phenotype with IFN signature, and adopt regulatory phenotype with IFN-beta.

CorpusId:220908447.title: Differential IRF8 Transcription Factor Requirement Defines Two Pathways of Dendritic Cell Development in Humans
CorpusId:220908447.tldr: AXL+SIGLEC6+ pre-DCs map exclusively to the DC2 developmental pathway within the IRF8-high lymphoid-primed route.

CorpusId:4910432.title: Human dendritic cell subsets: an update
CorpusId:4910432.tldr: Review describing AXL+SIGLEC6+ cells as pre-DC with mainly cDC2 potential that stimulate T cells vigorously.

CorpusId:209330184.title: Integrated Cross-Species Analysis Identifies a Conserved Transitional Dendritic Cell Population
CorpusId:209330184.tldr: Identified mouse homolog of human AXL+ DCs as transitional DCs (tDCs) sharing properties with pDCs.

CorpusId:283240002.title: Bridging pDCs and cDCs: The Identity of Transitional Dendritic Cells
CorpusId:283240002.tldr: Comprehensive review of tDC/ASDC identity, placing them as a bona fide DC subset bridging pDC and cDC2.

CorpusId:248543355.title: Diversification of circulating and tumor-infiltrating plasmacytoid DCs towards the P3 (CD80+ PDL1-)-pDC subset negatively correlated with clinical outcomes in melanoma patients
CorpusId:248543355.tldr: AS DCs infiltrate tumors and skin during wounding; melanoma down-modulates their TRAIL-mediated function.

CorpusId:155104832.title: Human Dendritic Cell Subsets, Ontogeny, and Impact on HIV Infection
CorpusId:155104832.tldr: Review of human DC subsets including Axl+ DCs, noting their phenotypic continuum from pDC-like to cDC2-like states.

CorpusId:254972301.title: Immunomics analysis of rheumatoid arthritis identified precursor dendritic cells as a key cell subset of treatment resistance
CorpusId:254972301.tldr: Pre-DC/AS DC linked to treatment resistance in rheumatoid arthritis.
